description: High-top sneakers from id gives a high-fashion spin to your off-duty wardrobe. Designed with the right balance of fashion and lifestyle inspiration, this shoe mimics worker boots in its design. Wear this with a tonal T-shirt, skinny jeans and a structured blazer or jacket. Comes with a spare set of laces Upper High top leather upper with perforated details at the collar Central lace ups Mesh lining Contrast stitch detailing Soft footbed Upper glued to the outsole Outsole Lightweight rubber outsole with an upraised heel and patterned grooves Shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner Do not store in direct sunlight
